case_title: HU, GUO JUN VS DURAN, VICTOR

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-03-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-08-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFCATION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HU, GUO JUN AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, GUO JUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTOR $1,322.74 PRINCIPAL, $114.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,437.24, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $322.74 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE, AND $1000 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, VICTOR
ORDER DATED SEPTEMBER 02, 2008 ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WAS "APPROVED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
